description: A colophon for a manuscript now lost, containing Musaf prayer for the Hebrew New year. The copyist is Mevōrakh b. Moshe, known from other colophons (see PGPID 39063). His he lists his lineage for five generations (see PGPID for the family 2244). He was active in the second half of the twelfth century in Dumyāt.
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
